findings.description: The source h2 section テスト結果検証 contains 3 h3 subsections (データベースの結果検証, ファイルの結果検証, ログの結果検証) and its plain text is well over 2000 characters including tables, notes, and the log example. Per V3 rules, this warrants splitting into separate sections rather than merging all three into s7.
findings.source_evidence: Source has three distinct h3 sections under テスト結果検証: データベースの結果検証, ファイルの結果検証 (with a 2-row file type table), and ログの結果検証 (with column table, AND-condition notes, warning about 0-row case, and concrete example table). Combined plain text clearly exceeds 2000 characters.
